text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, when Ines Fujin is riding her bike to a
far-off running course...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Oh no! This can't be happening!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
O-okay, I just have to patch it up! I'm pretty sure
I have something that'll work. Um... Uh...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Oh yeah, I've got this bandage—which definitely
won't help at all...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Oh man. Guess I'm all out of luck. Better get it
fixed at a repair shop...
